_collision_note: EXACT mesh collision: the pipeline writes a PhysicsMeshFile node (inside PhysicsShapeList) that references the render FBX, so every triangle is solid -- including the ladder (you climb against it; the LadderVolume trigger in WaterTower.prefab still drives the climb). The WaterTower.prefab puts a ModelCollider (Model=watertower.vmdl) on the Visual child so collision rides the EXACT visual transform, immune to the instance's non-uniform scale + yaw. See docs/collision_authoring.md. To make a part HOLLOW (e.g. a climb-through ladder), set collision.mode=collision_mesh + collision.filename=models/<name>_collision.fbx and generate that file with: python scripts/export_collision_mesh.py environment_model.blend/watertower.blend Assets/models/watertower_collision.fbx --exclude-prefix Ladder_
